title: Kimi K2.7 Code: THIS is VERY CRAZY MAN!
summary: Moonshot AI released Kimi K2.7 Code, an open-source coding-focused agentic model with a Mixture-of-Experts architecture, one trillion parameters, and 256K context window. The accompanying Kimi Code CLI enables terminal-based repository exploration, file editing, command execution, and testing with plan mode for codebase investigation.
writeup: The video covers Moonshot AI's release of Kimi K2.7 Code, an open-source coding-focused agentic model built on a Mixture-of-Experts architecture with one trillion parameters and a 256K context window. It also walks through the accompanying Kimi Code CLI, which supports terminal-based repository exploration, file editing, command execution, and testing, along with a plan mode for codebase investigation. The takeaways: an open weights model at this scale targeting agentic coding, and a CLI tool that handles end-to-end repository work from the terminal.
